role_title: Associate Manager, Strategy and Operations, Fraud

seniority.level: Mid-level / Associate Manager (IC or people manager not specified)
level_signals: 4+ years of experience in management consulting, strategy, bizops, investment banking, analytics or related experience
Comp range $105,400–$155,000 consistent with mid-level at a large tech company

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of experience in management consulting, strategy, bizops, investment banking, analytics or related experience; high-growth tech experience preferred
Experience leading large projects, hitting goals, and succeeding in a team environment
Proven problem-solving and analytical skills; proficiency in SQL and Excel are required

scope.surface: Fraud prevention across DoorDash's platform — Consumers, Dashers, and Merchants
primary_metrics_inferred: User experience quality for good users
core_responsibilities: Define and implement DoorDash's fraud strategy in new areas
Deliver direct business impact related to fraud reduction
Analyze fraud vectors across DoorDash's platform with end-to-end analysis
Identify bad actors and improve the experience of good users
Partner with product, engineering, and analytics teams to establish goals and build strategic programs
Use data-driven decision-making to run tests to reduce fraud while accelerating growth

green_flags: Clear problem space (fraud) and audience (Consumers, Dashers, Merchants)
Comprehensive benefits package described including parental leave, wellness, 401(k)
Application deadline stated (8/7/2026), suggesting active hiring
red_flags: Work location type not specified — remote, hybrid, or onsite is unclear from the JD body
Manages-people status unclear for an 'Associate Manager' title
Pay range is national and localized, meaning actual pay could fall below the stated floor in some markets
